overall.description: A first-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 beginning at night in Japantown's neon-lit streets, transitioning through narrow corridors to bright rooftop vistas, and concluding inside a moving NCART train. The clip showcases the game's distinctive cyberpunk aesthetic with dramatic lighting shifts from artificial neon to natural daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial street in Japantown with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the neon-lit street past the Japantown South entrance, observing large vertical billboards and illuminated vending machines

entered.detail: illuminated blue entrance sign reading JAPANTOWN SOUTH mounted on building facade
large vertical digital billboard displaying BRAINITINE product advertisement with green and red coloring
row of illuminated vending machines with colorful graphics and neon lighting
digital map screen showing the local area with purple neon outlines

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, neon-lit street in Japantown. The camera moves forward past the illuminated Japantown South entrance sign and large vertical billboards. The environment is enclosed by tall buildings with various neon advertisements and vending machines visible along the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service corridors and maintenance walkways between buildings

events.description: emerges from dark enclosed street into bright daylight on elevated rooftop
transitions from ground level urban street to elevated rooftop environment with open sky

agents.ego_description: climbing through narrow passages and maintenance corridors, emerging from the dark interior into the bright open rooftop environment

entered.detail: elevated multi-level highway structure visible in the distance against the bright sky
tall futuristic buildings with glass facades visible on the horizon
illuminated billboard featuring a cartoon chef character with ALL FOODS text

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through narrow service corridors and maintenance passages, transitioning dramatically from the dark neon-lit street to a bright sunlit rooftop. The lighting shifts from artificial to natural as the camera emerges into the open air, revealing distant highways and skyscrapers against a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop walkways and terraces with panoramic city views

events.description: increases movement speed while traversing the elevated rooftop pathways

agents.ego_description: traversing the elevated rooftop walkways and terraces, navigating around HVAC units and structural elements while taking in the expansive city views

entered.detail: large digital advertising screens mounted on the highway infrastructure
distant mountain range visible beyond the urban skyline under clear skies
elevated train station structure for the NCART transit system with covered platforms
tall apartment buildings with curved facades and numerous windows

segments.scene_description: Moving along the elevated rooftop walkways in bright daylight, the camera navigates through an environment of mechanical equipment and structural elements. The scene offers panoramic views of the sprawling cyberpunk cityscape, with multi-level highways, distant mountains, and the approaching NCART station visible against a clear blue sky.

events.description: enters the NCART train from the rooftop station platform, transitioning from outdoor to indoor environment

agents.ego_description: standing inside the moving train holding onto a support pole, observing other passengers and watching the cityscape pass by through the windows

notable_agents.action: seated passenger wearing casual clothing and cap, looking down at something in their hands
standing passenger holding onto overhead rail, facing away from camera toward the train doors

entered.detail: futuristic train car with green bench seating, yellow support poles, and metallic walls
illuminated display showing NCART route information and destination in green text
large glass windows showing the passing urban environment outside

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place inside the moving NCART train, featuring a transition from the bright outdoor rooftop to the artificially lit interior. The camera stands among other passengers, with green seating and yellow poles visible, while the cityscape streams past the windows. The environment is enclosed and climate-controlled, with digital displays showing route information.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the dark, neon-saturated streets of Japantown into the bright daylight of a rooftop vista before concluding inside a moving train. It begins by gliding past illuminated entrance signs and towering vertical billboards within a dense urban canyon of vending machines and advertisements. As the camera pushes through narrow service corridors and maintenance passages, the artificial glow gives way to a dramatic burst of natural light upon emerging onto an open rooftop. The scene then expands across elevated walkways and mechanical structures, offering panoramic views of sprawling highways and distant mountains under a clear blue sky. Finally, the perspective shifts from the open air into the artificially lit interior of an NCART train, where the cityscape streams past the windows as the camera stands among passengers amidst green seating and yellow poles.
